---
title: "HBF_Analysis"
author: "Elizabeth Keeley"
date: "2026-03-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```


```{r}
# bring in datasets for Jul 31 and filter for biomassC by Time

HBF_1yr <- read.csv(here("HBF/HBF.1yr.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) # 1 year steady state run, daily output
HBF_1yr_biomassC <- HBF_1yr %>% select(Time, biomassC) 

HBF_Ca_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("HBF/HBF.Ca.Jul31.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) # doubling of CO2
HBF_Ca_Jul31_biomassC <- HBF_Ca_Jul31 %>% select(Time, biomassC)

HBF_Calld_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("HBF/HBF.Calld.Jul31.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) # combined doubling of CO2, 3.5oC warming, and 20% decrease in precipitation
HBF_Calld_Jul31_biomassC <- HBF_Calld_Jul31 %>% select(Time, biomassC)

HBF_Calli_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("HBF/HBF.Calli.Jul31.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) # combined doubling of CO2, 3.5oC warming, and 20% increase in precipitation
HBF_Calli_Jul31_biomassC <- HBF_Calli_Jul31 %>% select(Time, biomassC)

HBF_Pptd_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("HBF/HBF.Pptd.Jul31.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) # 20% decrease in precipitation	
HBF_Pptd_Jul31_biomassC <- HBF_Pptd_Jul31 %>% select(Time, biomassC)

HBF_Ppti_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("HBF/HBF.Ppti.Jul31.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) # 20% increase in precipitation
HBF_Ppti_Jul31_biomassC <- HBF_Ppti_Jul31 %>% select(Time, biomassC)

HBF_T_Jul31 <- read.csv(here("HBF/HBF.T.Jul31.out"), stringsAsFactors = TRUE) # 3.5degreesC warming
HBF_T_Jul31_biomassC <- HBF_T_Jul31 %>% select(Time, biomassC)
```

```{r}
# combine into one data frame
list_treats <- list(HBF_Ca_Jul31_biomassC, HBF_Calld_Jul31_biomassC, HBF_Calli_Jul31_biomassC, HBF_Pptd_Jul31_biomassC, HBF_Ppti_Jul31_biomassC, HBF_T_Jul31_biomassC)

HBF_alltreats <- Reduce(list_treats, left_join)

```


```{r}
# attempt at a figure
ggplot(HBF_Ppti_Jul31, aes(x=Time, y=biomassC)) +
  geom_line()
```
